places.name: Tivoli Gardens
places.description: Copenhagen's celebrated theme park and gardens.

places.name: Superkilen
places.description: An ultra-modern diversity park in Denmark has turned an entire city block electric pink.

places.name: Grundtvig’s Church
places.description: This sublime architectural marvel is a rare example of an expressionist church.

places.name: Elephant Gate
places.description: Pre-Nazi swastikas adorn the sculpted pachyderms flanking this brewhouse portal.

places.name: The Little Mermaid
places.description: The de facto symbol of Copenhagen is this bronze fairytale which cannot seem to keep its head for very long.

places.name: The Genetically Modified Little Mermaid
places.description: Hans Christian Andersen for the postmodern world.

places.name: Freetown Christiania
places.description: Danish tourist destination well known for open stalls where vendors sell marijuana on the street.

places.name: Leif Sonne's Bottled Beer Collection
places.description: The largest bottled beer collection in the world holds over 22,000 unique beer bottles.

places.name: Sankt Peders Bageri
places.description: Denmark’s oldest bakery is home to the 'Wednesday Snail,' one of the best cinnamon rolls on the planet.

places.name: Restaurant Schønnemann
places.description: Traditional Danish spot where the schnapps are flowing and the smørrebrød is loaded.
